title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 479.140 - Judge to be trier of fact, when
text:
479.140.  Judge to be trier of fact, when. — In any trial for the violation of a municipal ordinance, all issues of fact shall be tried by the judge except where trial by jury is authorized by law and the defendant or his attorney requests a trial by jury.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
